title: MCParks - The Unofficial Modpack
description: The best way to enjoy the magic of the MCParks server!
body:
# 🔍 Overview!
**Welcome to the most magical modpack on earth!** 

Well, not really, MCParks is responsible for most of the magic. My goal with this modpack is to enhance your MCParks experience and make it as enjoyable and issue-free as possible. Optifine is great, but we have reached a point where practically all of MCParks' custom features can be addressed by individual mods. From here, Fabric opens the gates to similar performance on newer versions (more on this below in **Technical Details**), quality of life additions, and better visuals. The “practically” part is that there are some [missing features and bugs](https://github.com/SorryImInjured/MCParks-Modpack/issues), but your experience shouldn’t be affected heavily, and I think the tradeoffs are well worth it! Now, as always, we’re continuing to move forward into the future, and MCParks will update to newer versions of the game (probably not, but one can wish). Currently, incompatible and up-and-coming mods can be used to make improvements. The MCParks Modpack will never be completed. It will continue to grow as long as there is imagination left in the world. But to do this, I need your [help](https://github.com/SorryImInjured/MCParks-Modpack/issues), whether bug reports, recommendations, or complaints. Below is a list of notable features, with a complete list further down. Now have a great big beautiful tomorrow!

- Huge view distances to fully take in the work of the builders.
- Easily connect to and control MCParks' authentic audio without the website.
- Revamped chat that includes universal emojis, longer history, configurable auto Welcome Home, and configurable macros **(G:/sit, H:/fly)**!
- Emotes to interact with other players **(B)**!
- Included shaders for even better ambiance.
- Smooth head movement on attractions.
- Custom models which replace the trash bins.
- Walt Disney Presents: One Man's Dream plays the actual full-length film.
- And more!

<details>
<summary>Full list of features!</summary>

**MCParks Specific**
  
- Built-in MCParks audio client, no need for the website anymore!
- Replaces MCParks' trash bins with actual models!
- Plays the actual video for Walt Disney Presents: One Man's Dream!
- View showtimes formatted to your time zone! Use 'F8' or your MagicBand!
- View and track the Ride of the Day from your MagicBand!
- Configure a custom welcome home message to be sent when a new player joins! Can't be tricked by fake messages!
- Reminders to donate at the wishing well in Magic Kingdom!
- Manually and/or automatically reduce the quality of demanding models!
- Removed the bars above the hotbar to clean up your screen!

**QoL**

- Configurable chat macros, have a look at controls in options!
- Smooth head movement on attractions!
- Dynamic crosshair that hides itself!
- In-game screenshot manager!
- Freecam for taking pictures 'F4'!
- MCParks' resourcepack won't reload on every join!
- Indicator to easily see what other players are using the pack!
- Indicator to see when other users are AFK!
- Freelook with your side mouse buttons, can be changed!
- Type universal emojis using ':'!
- Spell check built into chat!
- Cleaner F3 overlay!
- Controller support!
- Modpack update notifications!
- Extremely long chat history!
- Mouse Tweaks!
- Crash Assistant!

**Miscellaneous**

- Huge render distances above the server's limit!
- Included shaders!
- Emotes which can be seen by other pack users!
- 3D Player Skins!
- High resolution screenshots!
- Blurred background in GUIs!
- More sounds in GUIs and your inventory!
- More immersive rain sounds!
- More immersive footsteps!
- Wavey capes!

**Bug Fixes**

- Fixed rope rendering! (Not complete)
- Fixed some player heads not displaying correctly around MCParks!

</details>

# 🛠️ Technical Details!
The **minimum RAM** allocation is **2GBs**; however, I recommend you allocate **4GBs** of **RAM** or more, don't go over **8GBs**.

One of the mod pack's primary objectives is to deliver the best possible performance. As a result, many users with mid to high-end machines shouldn't have many problems with the default settings. However, MCParks can be intensive to run on some older machines. **If you experience any trouble, please consider…**

1. **Switching Shaders to VanillAA** (If your GPU can't keep up or you don't have a GPU, it's recommended that you try VanillAA, which is very lightweight anyway, before disabling them completely).
  2. **Lowering Render Distance** (If you want the original MCParks experience, set it to 10)
3. **Settings Particles to Decreased** (MCParks makes use of lots of particles)

_Full functionality is not guaranteed for macOS users._

<details>
<summary>How does it compare to MCParks' recommendation of 1.12.2 Optifine? And the primary drawback.</summary>
Performance is ultimately very similar to 1.12.2 Optifine, but stutter and 1% lows on the modpack tend to be slightly better, creating a smoother experience than 1.12.2. What is the primary drawback? MCParks' use of voxel models. Unfortunately, 1.18.2's renderer handles these models very poorly, creating situations where performance is significantly worse when many are on screen at once. Fortunately, MCParks doesn't have too many areas where this situation is present, so as long as your system doesn't struggle outside of these intense areas, it should be playable. I am actively working to mitigate and, hopefully, one day solve this drawback. If you have experience in this area, help is more than welcome!
</details>





# 🤝 Want to help?
If you see the potential and want to take part in the development of the pack, send me a message on Discord at **”SorryImInjured”**!

_We’re currently in need of…_
- **Playtesters**, look for bugs and give recommendations.
- **Digital Artists**, design and texture models, and make menus and loading screens.
- **Shaderpack Tuner**, configure multiple shaderpacks to fit the server and different systems.
- **Developers**, make ideas that can’t be addressed with current mods a reality.

# 🌟 Credits and Thanks!
- **The MCParks Team**, for an awesome server!
- **Fireball71**, contributed by creating many textures for the Better Bins mod, developing the MCParks Show Tracker mod, developing an API used for ROTD, and playtesting!
- **Maczimus**, contributed by helping to solve the issues with custom clothing textures, recommending the SmoothCoasters Mod, and playtesting!
- **Leroy**, contributed by developing the API used for the MCParks Show Tracker mod, and taking pictures for the gallery!
- **MysticalMyst**, contributed by playtesting!
- **Ryus**, contributed with the idea of adding macros and auto Welcome Home!
- ~~**haimcyfly**, the creator of [Stay True](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/stay-true)! (Removed as of Beta 1.4.0)~~
- **All of the included project developers!**

_Disclaimer: I and the project are not associated directly with MCParks in any way._
